title: Automation to Create custom Note
excerpt: I need to be able to create customized note text and have it recorded to the contacts (item) activity board.  This is a good automation to be able to have text ready for copy paste operations.  It should be very easy as …

posts.author: johnpauldaniel (John Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to be able to create customized note text and have it recorded to the contacts (item) activity board. This is a good automation to be able to have text ready for copy paste operations. It should be very easy as there is already a custom note with template module. It just is not available in the automation list for some reason. It would be really nice if you could make this available.
